task_completion.description: Navigate to the Request or Service Request window in iDempiere
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab, window title, or active menu item indicating 'Request' or 'Service Request' is open in the iDempiere web interface.
The 'Request Type' dropdown or field is populated with a value (representing the first available option).
The 'Summary' text field contains the exact text: 'Paint peeling on outdoor furniture - customer requests replacement'.
The 'Business Partner' or 'BPartner' field is set to 'Joe Block'.

task_completion.description: Set Priority to High and Confidentiality to Customer Confidential
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Priority' dropdown shows 'High' and the 'Confidentiality' dropdown shows 'Customer Confidential' (or 'Customer').
The 'Due Type' dropdown or field is set to 'Due'.
The 'Description' text area contains the text starting with 'Customer Joe Block called to report that the paint on the outdoor furniture set...'.

task_completion.description: Save the new service request record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Record Saved' notification, a newly generated record number/ID at the top of the form, or the Save icon appearing disabled/greyed out indicating no unsaved changes.

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web GUI to create the request
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and iDempiere form fields, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly the iDempiere ERP/CRM system, not a text editor, mock-up, or generic notes app.

integrity.description: Data was actually entered into the form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The requested text and selections are visible inside the proper input fields and dropdowns of the application form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In iDempiere, Priority 'High' corresponds to internal code '3', and Confidentiality 'Customer Confidential' corresponds to internal code 'C'. The task expects a single new service request to be created with the summary containing 'paint peeling'.
